name: 天照经过灼烧
description: 任何棋子移动后，检查路径上是否经过天照格子，若有则附加天照效果层数
skillCode: if (!battle.extensions || !battle.extensions.amaterasuCells || battle.extensions.amaterasuCells.length === 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; var movedPiece = context.sourcePiece; if (!movedPiece || movedPiece.currentHp <= 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; var lastMoveAction = null; for (var i = battle.actions.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) { if (battle.actions[i].type === 'move' && battle.actions[i].payload && battle.actions[i].payload.pieceId === movedPiece.instanceId) { lastMoveAction = battle.actions[i]; break; } } if (!lastMoveAction) return { success: false, message: '' }; var fromX = lastMoveAction.payload.fromX; var fromY = lastMoveAction.payload.fromY; var toX = movedPiece.x; var toY = movedPiece.y; var pathCells = []; if (fromX === toX) { var stepY = fromY < toY ? 1 : -1; for (var y = fromY + stepY; stepY > 0 ? y <= toY : y >= toY; y += stepY) pathCells.push({ x: toX, y: y }); } else if (fromY === toY) { var stepX = fromX < toX ? 1 : -1; for (var x = fromX + stepX; stepX > 0 ? x <= toX : x >= toX; x += stepX) pathCells.push({ x: x, y: toY }); } else { pathCells.push({ x: toX, y: toY }); } var amaterasuHit = 0; pathCells.forEach(function(cell) { if (battle.extensions.amaterasuCells.some(function(c) { return c.x === cell.x && c.y === cell.y; })) amaterasuHit++; }); if (amaterasuHit === 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; var tag = movedPiece.statusTags && movedPiece.statusTags.find(function(t) { return t.type === 'amaterasu-burn'; }); var newStacks; if (tag) { tag.stacks = (tag.stacks || 1) + amaterasuHit; newStacks = tag.stacks; } else { addStatusEffectById(movedPiece.instanceId, { id: 'amaterasu-burn-' + movedPiece.instanceId, name: '天照灼烧', type: 'amaterasu-burn', currentDuration: -1, currentUses: -1, intensity: 2, stacks: amaterasuHit }); newStacks = amaterasuHit; } return { success: true, message: movedPiece.name + '经过天照范围，附加' + amaterasuHit + '层天照效果（当前' + newStacks + '层）' };
